pr.title: Record: 0.4374 BPB — Distributed Prefill + Order-Adaptive 15-Gram + EBLS

output.summary: Looped EBLS + per-layer LoRA meets distributed n-gram cache prefill and order-adaptive entropy gating to align 8-GPU sliding eval with sequential scoring.
techniques: EBLS shared-block loops with rank-8 LoRA deviations
Distributed prefill of 2–15-gram hash tables per GPU rank
Order-adaptive entropy gating for multi-order backoff
